data.title: Infortrend debuts KS 3000U Edge AI server for mid-sized orgs, simplifying AI deployment at edge.
data.description: Taipei, 13th January 2026 - Infortrend Technology, Inc. (TWSE: 2495), a top player in enterprise storage and AI offerings, unveiled the KS 3000U edge AI server today. This new server is designed to empower mid-sized businesses and dispersed locations to implement AI inference efficiently.

data.title: For Ethereum to last 100 yrs, it needs quantum resistance, scalability, and a decentralized block-building model - Buterin.
data.description: For Ethereum to withstand the test of time, it requires quantum resistance, a scalable architecture, and an improved block-building model that can resist centralization pressures. These elements are crucial for the long-term success of Ethereum as they enhance the platform's security, efficiency, and decentralization. By implementing these advancements, Ethereum can strengthen its position in the market and adapt to future technological challenges. Innovations in these areas will be key in ensuring Ethereum's continued relevance and competitiveness in the ever-evolving cryptocurrency landscape.

data.title: Tryg A/S compiles consensus estimates from 16 analysts for 2025 annual report.
data.description: Tryg has gathered consensus estimates for their annual report in 2025 with the input of 16 financial analysts.

data.title: Ex-NYC mayor launches 'NYC Token' memecoin on Solana; briefly surged before plunging. Proceeds to fund education initiatives.
data.description: The NYC Token, which runs on the Solana network, experienced a rapid increase in value upon its initial release. However, the token's value quickly dropped after the surge. Eric Adams announced that the profits from the NYC Token would be directed towards education projects.

data.title: JPMorgan's Q4 results to show if dealmaking will replace rate-driven profits for big banks in 2026. SpaceX's $1.5 trillion IPO in focus for the bank.
data.description: JPMorgan Chase & Co. is gearing up to announce its fourth-quarter results, marking the start of the bank earnings season. Analysts anticipate the company will influence the industry in 2026, focusing on deal-making over rate-driven profits. Senior Editor, Alexis Garcia, highlighted that investment banking and trading revenues will be key this year, with attention on SpaceX's projected $1.5 trillion IPO and other tech offerings. JPMorgan's strong performance as a money center bank has consistently surpassed that of regional lenders. For more details, the full article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: MakeMyTrip Limited issued a Repurchase Right Notice for its 0.00% Convertible Senior Notes due 2028.
data.description: In Gurugram, India, MakeMyTrip Limited has issued a Repurchase Right Notice to holders of its 0.00% Convertible Senior Notes due in 2028. This announcement pertains to a financial move regarding the notes valued at a significant amount.

data.title: December 2025 saw ferry freight volumes at 3.0m lane meters, 1.2% increase from 2024. Full-year growth rates were -0.1% and -1.8%.
data.description: In December 2025, the total volume of ferry freight reached 3.0 million lane metres, showing a 1.2% increase compared to the previous year, with a slight decrease of 0.4% when accounting for route adjustments. Looking at the full year, there was a marginal growth of -0.1% and a more noticeable decline of -1.8% when adjusting for route changes.

data.title: The Delivery Conference 2026 at Royal Lancaster Hotel, London on 2-3 Feb to gather 500 brands for two days of industry insights. Keynote by Richard Ayoade.
data.description: London-based Metapack and ShipStation have disclosed the revival of The Delivery Conference (TDC) 2026, set to occur on February 2–3, 2026, at the Royal Lancaster Hotel in London. TDC serves as a paramount event for retail, ecommerce, and logistics advancement, drawing senior executives from more than 500 worldwide brands. This conference will offer forward-thinking insights, industry discussions, and valuable networking opportunities over a two-day period.

The US intervention in Venezuela shifts attention straight to oil markets. With Maduro detained, questions around control of Venezuela’s vast oil reserves and future production are back in play, with potential global supply implications.

data.title: Aquisor, a new M&A buy-side advisory firm by Vorgers & Kupriyanova, former Harvey & Company execs, launched in London.
data.description: In London on January 13, 2026, former leaders of Harvey & Company's European office, Dirk-Jan Vorgers and Ekaterina Kupriyanova, unveiled Aquisor. This newly established European M&A buy-side advisory firm aims to collaborate with private equity firms to enhance portfolio expansion. The firm's primary focus is on utilizing strategic partnerships to drive growth within portfolios.

data.title: KatRisk acquires Symfos to boost underwriting and portfolio risk intelligence, aiming to enhance their catastrophe risk models.
data.description: In La Jolla, California on January 13, 2026, KatRisk, a prominent provider of catastrophe risk models and climate analytics worldwide, disclosed the purchase of Symfos. Symfos, a UK-based company known for developing the Orchestra underwriting and portfolio intelligence platform. This acquisition signals a significant development in the industry landscape, consolidating expertise and resources.

data.title: Emburse launches Invoice Tax Validation to aid global businesses in complying with e-invoice regulations.
data.description: In Dallas, Emburse, a leading company in Expense Intelligence utilizing AI for travel and spending coordination, introduced Invoice Tax Validation to aid finance teams in adhering to new e-invoice and Continuous Transaction Control regulations. This new feature highlights Emburse’s role as a vital AI-based platform for CFOs aiming to efficiently manage and enhance spending throughout their organization. The launch further solidifies Emburse's commitment to assisting in financial compliance and optimization, with over 90 organizations already benefiting from this innovative solution.

data.title: AI EdgeLabs launches Compliance Center and Linux Audit for organizations facing NIS2, CRA mandates. Automated controls replace manual reporting.
data.description: In Dover, Del., AI EdgeLabs unveiled the Compliance Center and Linux Audit as part of their autonomous AI runtime platform. These innovations cater to organizations dealing with NIS2, CRA, and global critical-infrastructure regulations, introducing features that eliminate manual reporting and scan-dependent compliance practices. This update provides continuous visibility, automated control coverage, and real-time posture insights. Notable features consist of a singular Risk Score indicating the organization's current stance and real-time monitoring capabilities.

data.title: Forrester predicts AI to result in 6% of US job losses, about 10.4 million roles by 2030 - not a full job apocalypse.
data.description: A report by Forrester projects that automation and AI will moderately impact jobs until 2030. It is anticipated that AI may contribute to a 6% reduction in total US jobs, amounting to approximately 10.4 million positions. However, widespread mass replacement of jobs by AI is deemed improbable as significant labor productivity growth would be required for AI to supplant human workers on a large scale. Instead of displacing jobs, the report predicts that AI will enhance around 20% of positions within the next five years.

data.title: Aviation Capital Group orders 50 Boeing 737 MAX jets, doubling 737-10 order book with 25 new jets and ordering 25 more 737-8s. Biggest order for the 737-10 aircraft type by a lessor.
data.description: Aviation Capital Group LLC (ACG) has significantly increased its order of Boeing 737 aircrafts, totaling 50 new jets. This includes the acquisition of an additional 25 737-10 jets and an order for 25 737-8 jets, making it the largest order placed by a lessor for the 737-10 model. The agreement was disclosed in Seattle on January 13, 2026, solidifying the partnership between Boeing and ACG.

data.title: ESTEVE acquires TerSera Therapeutics' Infusion Specialty Therapies Business Unit, expanding U.S. presence.
data.description: In Barcelona, Spain and Deerfield, Illinois, on January 13, 2026, ESTEVE and TerSera Therapeutics LLC disclosed a deal where ESTEVE is set to procure TerSera's Infusion Specialty Therapies Business Unit (IST). This significant agreement marks a crucial step forward for both companies in their strategic growth, with ESTEVE acquiring control over the IST business unit, signifying a corner turn in both companies' future prospects.

data.title: Kolibri Global Energy reports strong production with Barnes wells in Oklahoma, one well averaging 634 BOEPD.
data.description: Kolibri Global Energy Inc. has announced operational developments regarding its recent wells in the Tishomingo field in Oklahoma. Specifically, the Barnes 6-31-2H and Barnes 6-4H wells, both held at a 100% working interest, have been producing for around 30 days. The Barnes 6-31-2H well, with a 1.5-mile lateral extension, achieved an average of 634 Barrels of oil equivalent per day (BOEPD), with 529 barrels of oil per day (BOPD). The company trades under the symbols TSX: KEI and NASDAQ: KGEI.
